texto: You will go far in the Church.""I have no desire to go far. My only ambition is to be a good priest.""You will be that, of course. Nevertheless, you will go higher. And do you know why?”“Why?”“Because,” said Orselli, “you are not afraid of worldliness. I do not mean that you are worldly. Far from it. But you have a talent for being all things to all men.
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Henry Morton Robinson que provoca limites e escolhas conscientes. Ao questionar “You will go far in the Church.""I have no desire to go far. My only ambition is to be a good prie…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre reflexao, catholic, church, com foco em church e priest.

frase_original: You will go far in the Church.""I have no desire to go far. My only ambition is to be a good priest.""You will be that, of course. Nevertheless, you will go higher. And do you know why?”“Why?”“Because,” said Orselli, “you are not afraid of worldliness. I do not mean that you are worldly. Far from it. But you have a talent for being all things to all men.
